formulas.formula: Trade revenues + Related parties revenues = Total revenues
components: Sales and other operating revenues - Trade
Sales and other operating revenues - Related parties
Total Sales and other operating revenues
formulas.operation: Sales and other operating revenues - Trade + Sales and other operating revenues - Related parties
formulas.result_label: Total Sales and other operating revenues

formulas.formula: Cost of sales + Impairments + SGA + RD = Total operating costs
components: Operating costs and expenses - Cost of sales
Operating costs and expenses - Selling, general and administrative expenses
Operating costs and expenses - Research and development expenses
formulas.operation: Operating costs and expenses - Cost of sales + Operating costs and expenses - Impairments + Operating costs and expenses - Selling, general and administrative expenses + Operating costs and expenses - Research and development expenses
formulas.result_label: Total operating costs and expenses

formulas.formula: Total revenues - Total operating costs = Operating income
components: Total Sales and other operating revenues
formulas.operation: Total Sales and other operating revenues - Total operating costs and expenses
formulas.result_label: Operating income

formulas.formula: Operating income - Interest expense + Interest income + Other expense net = Income before equity and taxes
components: Income from continuing operations before equity investments and income taxes
formulas.operation: Operating income - Interest expense + Interest income + Other expense, net
formulas.result_label: Income from continuing operations before equity investments and income taxes

formulas.formula: Income before equity investments and taxes + Equity income = Income before taxes
components: Income from continuing operations before equity investments and income taxes
Income from continuing operations before income taxes
formulas.operation: Income from continuing operations before equity investments and income taxes + (Loss) income from equity investments
formulas.result_label: Income from continuing operations before income taxes

formulas.formula: Income before taxes - Tax provision = Income from continuing operations
components: Income from continuing operations before income taxes
formulas.operation: Income from continuing operations before income taxes - Provision for income taxes
formulas.result_label: Income from continuing operations

formulas.formula: Income from continuing operations + Discontinued operations = Net income
components: Loss from discontinued operations, net of tax
formulas.operation: Income from continuing operations + Loss from discontinued operations, net of tax
formulas.result_label: Net income

formulas.formula: Net income - Dividends on redeemable NCI = Net income attributable to Company shareholders
components: Net income attributable to the Company shareholders
formulas.operation: Net income - Dividends on redeemable non-controlling interests
formulas.result_label: Net income attributable to the Company shareholders

formulas.formula: Cash + Restricted cash + AR Trade + AR Related + Inventories + Prepaid = Total current assets
components: Prepaid expenses and other current assets
formulas.operation: Cash and cash equivalents + Restricted cash + Accounts receivable - Trade, net + Accounts receivable - Related parties + Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other current assets
formulas.result_label: Total current assets

formulas.formula: PP&E gross - Accumulated depreciation = PP&E net
formulas.operation: Property, plant and equipment (gross) - Less: Accumulated depreciation
formulas.result_label: Property, plant and equipment, net

formulas.formula: Total current assets + Operating lease assets + PP&E net + Equity investments + Goodwill + Intangibles + Other assets = Total assets
formulas.operation: Total current assets + Operating lease assets + Property, plant and equipment, net + Equity investments + Goodwill + Intangible assets, net + Other assets
formulas.result_label: Total assets

formulas.formula: Current LT debt + Short-term debt + AP Trade + AP Related + Accrued liabilities = Total current liabilities
formulas.operation: Current maturities of long-term debt + Short-term debt + Accounts payable - Trade + Accounts payable - Related parties + Accrued liabilities
formulas.result_label: Total current liabilities

formulas.formula: Ordinary shares + APIC + Retained earnings + AOCI + Treasury stock = Total Company equity
components: Total Company share of shareholders equity
formulas.operation: Ordinary shares + Additional paid-in capital + Retained earnings + Accumulated other comprehensive loss + Treasury stock
formulas.result_label: Total Company share of shareholders equity

formulas.formula: Company equity + NCI = Total equity
components: Total Company share of shareholders equity
formulas.operation: Total Company share of shareholders equity + Non-controlling interests
formulas.result_label: Total equity

formulas.formula: Total current liabilities + Long-term debt + Operating lease liabilities + Other liabilities + Deferred income taxes + Redeemable NCI + Total equity = Total liabilities and equity
components: Total liabilities, redeemable non-controlling interests and equity
formulas.operation: Total current liabilities + Long-term debt + Operating lease liabilities + Other liabilities + Deferred income taxes + Redeemable non-controlling interests + Total equity
formulas.result_label: Total liabilities, redeemable non-controlling interests and equity

formulas.formula: Total assets = Total liabilities redeemable NCI and equity
components: Total liabilities, redeemable non-controlling interests and equity
formulas.operation: Total assets
formulas.result_label: Total liabilities, redeemable non-controlling interests and equity

line_items.mapping_reason: HTML CF row 'Cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash at beginning of period' references beginning balances; XBRL fact contextRef c-9 (2022-12-31) = 2156 and c-10 (2021-12-31) = 1477 match

line_items.label: Cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash at end of period
line_items.mapping_reason: HTML CF row 'Cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash at end of period' tagged with ix:nonFraction name='us-gaap:CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalents' contextRef c-8 (2023-06-30)=2494 and c-11 (2022-06-30)=1066

formulas.formula: Net income + DA + Impairments + Debt amortization + SBC - Equity income + Distributions + Deferred taxes - AR change - Inventory change + AP change + Other = CFO
components: Equity investments - Distributions of earnings, net of tax
Changes in assets and liabilities - Accounts receivable
Changes in assets and liabilities - Inventories
Changes in assets and liabilities - Accounts payable
Changes in assets and liabilities - Other, net
Net cash provided by operating activities
formulas.operation: Net income + Depreciation and amortization + Impairments + Amortization of debt-related costs + Share-based compensation - Equity investments - Equity income + Equity investments - Distributions of earnings, net of tax + Deferred income tax provision + Changes in assets and liabilities - Accounts receivable + Changes in assets and liabilities - Inventories + Changes in assets and liabilities - Accounts payable + Changes in assets and liabilities - Other, net
formulas.result_label: Net cash provided by operating activities

formulas.formula: Capex + Proceeds from equity securities + Other investing = CFI
components: Expenditures for property, plant and equipment
Net cash used in investing activities
formulas.operation: Expenditures for property, plant and equipment + Proceeds from equity securities + Other, net (investing)
formulas.result_label: Net cash used in investing activities

formulas.formula: Share repurchases + Dividends + LTD issuance + Debt costs + Commercial paper + Collateral + Other financing = CFF
components: Net (repayments of) proceeds from commercial paper
Collateral received from interest rate derivatives
Net cash used in financing activities
formulas.operation: Repurchases of Company ordinary shares + Dividends paid - common stock + Issuance of long-term debt + Payments of debt issuance costs + Net (repayments of) proceeds from commercial paper + Collateral received from interest rate derivatives + Other, net (financing)
formulas.result_label: Net cash used in financing activities

formulas.formula: CFO + CFI + CFF + FX = Net change in cash
components: Net cash provided by operating activities
Net cash used in investing activities
Net cash used in financing activities
Effect of exchange rate changes on cash
Increase (decrease) in cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash
formulas.operation: Net cash provided by operating activities + Net cash used in investing activities + Net cash used in financing activities + Effect of exchange rate changes on cash
formulas.result_label: Increase (decrease) in cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash

formulas.formula: Beginning cash + Net change = Ending cash
components: Cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash at beginning of period
Increase (decrease) in cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash
Cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash at end of period
formulas.operation: Cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash at beginning of period + Increase (decrease) in cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash
formulas.result_label: Cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash at end of period

xbrl_not_on_statement.reason: Beginning of period cash balances; the XBRL fact appears on the CF statement as beginning balance but not as a separate XBRL-tagged line in the traditional sense - it reuses the same concept as ending cash

cross_statement_checks.check: Net income on IS matches Net income starting CF
Ending cash on CF (cash plus restricted cash) matches Cash and restricted cash on BS (current period June 30 2023)
cross_statement_checks.note: CF ending cash 2494 = BS Cash 2468 + BS Restricted cash 26 = 2494

cross_statement_checks.check: Beginning cash on CF matches Cash and restricted cash on BS (prior period Dec 31 2022)
cross_statement_checks.note: CF beginning cash 2156 = BS Cash 2151 + BS Restricted cash 5 = 2156

cross_statement_checks.check: Retained earnings change on BS matches net income minus dividends minus share repurchases charged to retained earnings plus other items
cross_statement_checks.note: RE change = 9580 - 9195 = 385. Net income 1189, dividends common -797, redeemable NCI dividends -3, SBC charged to RE -4 = 1189 - 797 - 3 - 4 = 385. Share repurchases go to Treasury stock not retained earnings. Match confirmed.

operating_leases.current_location: The non-current operating lease liability of 1437M is shown as a separate line 'Operating lease liabilities' on the balance sheet. The current portion is not shown as a separate line on the balance sheet face. The XBRL tag OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrentStatementOfFinancialPositionExtensibleList is not available in the provided XBRL facts. The current portion is likely embedded within 'Accrued liabilities' of 2164M but cannot be separately identified from the provided data. Flag: current operating lease liability not separately disclosed on balance sheet face.

depreciation_and_amortization.note: Primary D&A line on CF is 787M (us-gaap:DepreciationDepletionAndAmortization for YTD 2023). Debt cost amortization of 4M is a separate CF line. Total for cash flow reconciliation purposes: D&A addback is 787M; debt amortization 4M is separate. Segment reconciliation in Note 12 confirms 787M for six months 2023.

accounts_payable.note: Balance sheet shows separate 'Accounts payable - Trade' of 3024M tagged as us-gaap:AccountsPayableTradeCurrent. This is pure trade AP. Related party payables of 493M are shown separately. Note 6 discloses 57M of supply chain finance obligations included within AP Trade as of June 30 2023.

accounts_receivable.note: Balance sheet shows 'Accounts receivable - Trade, net' of 3638M tagged as us-gaap:AccountsReceivableNetCurrent, net of allowance for credit losses of 6M per Note 4. Related party receivables of 173M are separately shown. This is pure trade AR.

capex.note: CF statement shows 'Expenditures for property, plant and equipment' of 653M (us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquirePropertyPlantAndEquipment) for six months 2023. No separate intangibles capex line. No supplemental disclosure of capital expenditures incurred but not yet paid found in the provided XBRL data.

acquisitions.note: No acquisition-related cash flow line items appear in the six months ended June 30 2023 investing activities section. Note 12 mentions acquisition of remaining 50% of Quality Circular Polymers in April 2023; however no separate cash payment for acquisition appears as a tagged XBRL fact in the investing section. The acquisition may be captured within 'Other, net' investing of -89M or may have been non-cash. Cannot confirm cash paid for acquisitions from available data.

short_term_debt.note: Short-term debt balance per BS is 130M (us-gaap:ShortTermBorrowings). Per Note 6, this consists entirely of precious metal financings of 130M. No commercial paper outstanding, no US Receivables Facility borrowings.

sbc.note: Share-based compensation addback on CF statement is 48M (us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensation) for six months ended June 30 2023. No breakout by function found in the provided XBRL facts.

interest_expense.source: IS shows Interest expense of 231M and Interest income of 51M separately for six months 2023. No note disclosure separating gross interest expense further. The 231M is the gross interest expense figure as presented on the income statement.

flags: Goodwill impairment of 252M in H1 2023 with no tax benefit increases effective rate by 2.8%; audit settlement increases rate by 2.4%; effective rate of 22.9% for H1 2023 per Note 8

inventory.note: Per Note 5 inventory breakdown at June 30 2023: Finished goods 3444M, Work-in-process 217M, Raw materials and supplies 1534M, Total 5195M

formula_checks.formula: Trade revenues + Related parties revenues = Total revenues
Cost of sales + Impairments + SGA + RD = Total operating costs
Total revenues - Total operating costs = Operating income
Operating income - Interest expense + Interest income + Other expense net = Income before equity and taxes
Income before equity investments and taxes + Equity income = Income before taxes
Income before taxes - Tax provision = Income from continuing operations
Income from continuing operations + Discontinued operations = Net income
Net income - Dividends on redeemable NCI = Net income attributable to Company shareholders
Cash + Restricted cash + AR Trade + AR Related + Inventories + Prepaid = Total current assets
PP&E gross - Accumulated depreciation = PP&E net
Total current assets + Operating lease assets + PP&E net + Equity investments + Goodwill + Intangibles + Other assets = Total assets
Current LT debt + Short-term debt + AP Trade + AP Related + Accrued liabilities = Total current liabilities
Ordinary shares + APIC + Retained earnings + AOCI + Treasury stock = Total Company equity
Company equity + NCI = Total equity
Total current liabilities + Long-term debt + Operating lease liabilities + Other liabilities + Deferred income taxes + Redeemable NCI + Total equity = Total liabilities and equity
Total assets = Total liabilities redeemable NCI and equity
Net income + DA + Impairments + Debt amortization + SBC - Equity income + Distributions + Deferred taxes - AR change - Inventory change + AP change + Other = CFO
Capex + Proceeds from equity securities + Other investing = CFI
Share repurchases + Dividends + LTD issuance + Debt costs + Commercial paper + Collateral + Other financing = CFF
CFO + CFI + CFF + FX = Net change in cash
Beginning cash + Net change = Ending cash
